title: The Fifteen Sisters
summary: In a salon at dusk, fifteen rainbow glass pendulums — each a hair shorter than the last — drift out of phase into snakes, braids and chaos, then snap back into unison once a minute.
notes: Pendulum-wave physics on a shared wave clock: sister i swings 22+i times per grand cycle, so unison recurs exactly once per cycle at any tempo. Blender-rendered salon plate (EEVEE, AgX) with NDC hotspots for the three diegetic exits (door ajar, distant star, moth by the candle); walls wear the mandala shop's sandstone, applied gently (0.8 overlay on the dark plaster). Chimes are Web Audio pentatonic sines; crickets and the hour bell are ElevenLabs one-shots; James's citysounds bed carries baked-in Dropzilla-style reverb (30%, RMS-matched) so the city sits outside in the distance. Opens in Candlelight; the keeper's cabinet (bottom-right pull) hides palette, form, evening light, tempo and release-pattern controls.

admin.notes: Idea #6 from World Ideas.md, selected by James 2026-07-12. Draft until James approves publication.
